product.name: Yutianli 7mm Thick Anti-Collision self Adhesive 3D Wall Panels Peel and Stick,10-Pack 57 Sq.Ft Antique Faux Brick Wall Panels Foam Faux Stone Wallpapers for Bedroom (10, Style A)
features: 3D Faux Brick Panels, retro brick pattern, show personality, bid farewell to the monotonous wall.Peel and stick, convenient cutting, easy to finish wall renovation. It is suitable for special wall, TV background wall, sofa wall, living room wall, bedroom wall, stairs, corridor, dirty wall and so on.
High quality PE foam, tasteless, non-toxic, formaldehyde free, no release of harmful substances, safe use.
The size of each PE foam wall panel is 2.52ft x 2.29ft (77X70cm), the thickness is 7mm.Bright surface, waterproof and dustproof, strong stain resistance, simple cleaning
The 7mm thick design is thicker than most of the retro brick wall panels on the market, with stronger three-dimensional sense and more durable. Anti collision, waterproof and sound insulation

Please clean the wall before pasting to ensure that the surface of the wall is flat, dry, free of dust, and the skin does not fall off, otherwise the pasting effect will be affected. It can be pasted on most smooth or flat surfaces, such as cement wall, lime wall, glass, steel, wood, paint wall, etc.
